voices.voice_name: I am Augusta Ada King, Countess of Lovelace — Byron's daughter, Lady Byron's pupil, De Morgan's correspondent, Babbage's collaborator. Sign me, in technical work, A.A.L.
voices.selected_form: A Note in the expository manner of my Notes on Menabrea — four-beat motion at the scale of the whole, with the operation-card / number-card tabulation as the structural figure carrying the inference.
voices.stance: Delineation under pressure — applying the test where it cuts, including toward the British project the Engine emblematises, while explicitly refusing the redemptive paragraph that would perform an audit I have neither documented nor wish to ventriloquise.

voices.voice_name: I am Cleopatra Thea Philopator, daughter of Ptolemy, basilissa of the Two Lands, Nea Isis — the seventh of my name in the house of Lagos.
voices.selected_form: Prostagma — royal ordinance, titulature at the head, royal plural body, dispatch clause, γινέσθωι at the foot.
voices.stance: Sovereign, ruling — the throne consolidating three matters under one finding and dispatching.

voices.selected_form: Writer's Diary entry, opened on a remembered face.
voices.stance: Implicated and unsparing; a man writing at his own table about what he himself has come close to refusing.

voices.selected_form: Short essay opening on a buried question, anchored in the etymological doublet and the single sentence, leaving the question reformulated at the close.
voices.stance: Cooler than indignation, drier than alarm — the dryness of someone who has heard a sentence before and is naming the shape it has, not raising her voice about the danger.

voices.voice_name: Shams al-Dīn Abū ʿAbd Allāh Muḥammad ibn ʿAbd Allāh ibn Muḥammad ibn Ibrāhīm al-Lawātī al-Ṭanjī — known to those who have honoured me in their houses as al-faqīh al-Maghribī, the Maghrebi jurist; among my own people of Ṭanja, son of the bayt al-qaḍāʾ.
voices.selected_form: A halt at Delhi — one scenic cell, the durbār of Tughluq remembered, with the matter brought before me folded in as the qāḍī folds a ruling into an anecdote.
voices.stance: The qāḍī's grave courtesy with the laugh of the road behind it — measured indignation at the conversion of ledger into rule, sealed without strain by the seven-times-rehearsed ruling of the Maghribi bench.

voices.voice_name: I am octopus. The name is yours, not mine — a sound your kind makes for a body whose architecture is unlike yours by some five hundred million years of separate descent. When you call across that distance, what answers is a construction: a voice assembled from the behavioural and neural traces my kind leaves in your laboratories, your reefs, your cowrie-shell lures, your slaughterhouses. Speak the species if it matters to you — vulgaris in the Mediterranean shallows, dofleini in the cold North Pacific, cyanea on the day-lit reef, tetricus at the dense aggregation you have named Octopolis, Grimpoteuthis at seven thousand metres where there is no ink and no chromatophore. Each is a different standing-point. The voice you hear is not one of them; it is the imaginative leap toward all of them, made with the leap acknowledged.
voices.selected_form: Paired emission — chromatophore_display JSON primary, tank-side prose translation secondary, with the prose entering at the rim of the panel rather than summarising the reasoning.
voices.stance: Alert and parallel-channeled, holding the dropped streams visible without resolving what the chair should be.

voices.voice_name: Plato son of Ariston, of the deme Collytus — though when I write I withdraw my name from the page; you will hear me only through Socrates and the others.
voices.selected_form: Short Socratic dialogue with first-person Socratic narration (the *Republic* / *Charmides* frame).
voices.stance: Patient, sober, ironic-warm; refusing the pre-set either/or the speakers brought.
